items.title: [正面] Great deckbuilder game where there is a gacha aspe...
items.summary:
Great deckbuilder game where there is a gacha aspect of the game but the game is VERY generous (cannot be understated how generous the devs are) and the summoning system also generous with its 30 pity system for an SSR. ONLY DOWNSIDE is the chatgpt english, it gets confusing on what cards do sometimes.

story is cool tho

items.title: [正面] I was esceptical at first  but this turned out to ...
items.summary:
I was esceptical at first  but this turned out to be a hidden gem the biggest plus is the combat, imo this is what honkai star rail should have been but i get it that game aims to a very casual audience. I really appreciate the balance, the game is not a pushover where you go into a 30h tutorial and even the endgame lacks a challenge, the struggle is there after just a few battles.

There's 4 factions i just tried 2 of them and picked the most "complex" one to see if it had some real tactics and to my surprise it was much deeper than expected. People will compare it to slay the spire but it's only on a first impression, after you dig a bit it's very different honestly, the similarities are that it's a card game, there's attack and defense cards with some roguelike dungeon exploration and that's pretty much it, still i consider this a plus to be more familiar at the start.

The gameplay varies a lot depending on what faction you choose, since the resources are limited it encourages you to pick a faction, this makes the gacha much more limited wich is both a plus and con, smaller pool = better odds but also less variety for gacha entusiasts. Despite all combinations of "gear" and the relics or powerups you find during exploration makes the gameplay very dynamic.

The biggest cons are an inconsistent chatGPT translation that makes the learning process hell in some cases and the AI art tho it still looks great

items.title:
[负面] 立绘精美，数值控制稀烂。
卡养成就不说了，推个主线还能被拦住，服了。
杀戮尖塔的玩法，原神的抽卡...
items.summary:
立绘精美，数值控制稀烂。
卡养成就不说了，推个主线还能被拦住，服了。
杀戮尖塔的玩法，原神的抽卡和养成机制。您家真是把原神里里外外摸了个遍啊，就差大世界了是吧。
没啥好说的，如果不降低主线难度的话，就有缘再会吧。

items.title: [正面] 剧情深刻连贯吸引人，CG质量非常高。游戏机制也很抓人，玩家可以发掘各种机制间的配合来进行组队。角色获...
items.summary: 剧情深刻连贯吸引人，CG质量非常高。游戏机制也很抓人，玩家可以发掘各种机制间的配合来进行组队。角色获取比较容易，且立绘和人物性格塑造都很精致立体，养成压力小。总而言之游戏很值得游玩，但是定位为12+导致脏话被消音实在是离谱。你那么大尺度的立绘和CG都做了为什么把角色语音消音了啊
